properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's so loud I just can't seem to slow this down I need you more than ever now Let the silence be the only sound

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your glory Becomes the only thing I see Your beauty brings me to my knees The awe that you inspire in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Makes me want to be still So still you can hear me breathing in So still you can hear me breathing out Let Your calm descend upon me now

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So now I stand before You broken down My feet upon this holy ground I can feel Your presence all around

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I hear You whisper softly I hear You speaking to me I hear You In the silence You call my name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I want to be still So still you can hear me breathing in So still you can hear me breathing out Let Your calm descend upon me now

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I want to be still, I want to be still, I want to be still, Be still
